headline: Avery Dennison (AVY) Draws Lower Target from Argus amid Tariff Concerns
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $1.03 billion, Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. headline: Dave Ramsey: The Importance of Recognizing a Problem
summary: One of the most important pieces of advice given to addicts attending 12-step recovery programs like Alcoholics Anonymous is this: the first step to resolving a problem is recognizing you have one. Financial author Dave Ramsey says the same principle applies to personal finances, and a Ramsey Show caller's story illustrates exactly why that moment of self-awareness matters so much. … Dave Ramsey: The Importance of Recognizing a Problem

headline: Prudent Growth Purchases Perimeter Oaks Shopping Center in Georgia
summary: Prudent Growth Partners, LLC, a private equity real estate firm based in Chapel Hill and Charlotte, NC, has completed the $5.3 million acquisition of Perimeter Oaks Shopping Center, a 34,700-square-foot neighborhood retail center located in Valdosta, Georgia.

content.title: Prudent Growth Purchases Perimeter Oaks Shopping Center in Georgia
content.summary: Prudent Growth Partners, LLC, a private equity real estate firm based in Chapel Hill and Charlotte, NC, has completed the $5.3 million acquisition of Perimeter Oaks Shopping Center, a 34,700-square-foot neighborhood retail center located in Valdosta, Georgia.

headline: nixit® Debuts in Walmart Nationwide With Its Vagina-Friendly Condoms™ in Its Largest Retail Rollout to Date
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 10, 2026--nixit®, a leader in sexual wellness and period care, is bringing its vagina-friendly condoms™ to nearly 2,000 U.S. Walmart stores, marking the largest retail rollout in the brand’s history. This brings nixit into one of the country’s most accessible retail environments, making cleaner, ingredient-conscious sexual wellness products easier to find nationwide.

content.title: nixit® Debuts in Walmart Nationwide With Its Vagina-Friendly Condoms™ in Its Largest Retail Rollout to Date
content.summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 10, 2026--nixit®, a leader in sexual wellness and period care, is bringing its vagina-friendly condoms™ to nearly 2,000 U.S. Walmart stores, marking the largest retail rollout in the brand’s history. This brings nixit into one of the country’s most accessible retail environments, making cleaner, ingredient-conscious sexual wellness products easier to find nationwide.

thumbnail.caption: nixit® vagina-friendly condoms™ are now available in nearly 2,000 Walmart stores across the U.S., marking the brand's largest retail rollout to date.

headline: Centric Confirmed as Dassault Systèmes' PLM Standard for Consumer Goods & Retail (CPGR)
summary: Centric Software® is pleased to announce that its parent company, Dassault Systèmes, endorses Centric PLM as the preferred solution for Consumer Packaged Goods & Retail (CPGR). Centric Software delivers innovative, integrated, end-to-end AI-powered enterprise solutions to take products from concept to commercialization.
